dishes.name: Blueberry Lemonade Cookie

dishes.name: Bride of Frankenstein
dishes.raw_description: A beautiful flavor, created to give companionship to the Frankenstein, the Bride of Frankenstein arrives!! This almost 1/2 pound monster of a Cookie is created in the same mold as the Frank Cookie but features White Chocolate, Golden Oreos, and M&M’s! ⁣  This Limited Edition Cookie is available for preorder every day of October along with her companion flavor, The Frankenstein! Available throughout October!

dishes.name: Candied Walnut Chocolate Chip
dishes.raw_description:
Only At
East End Market
Wednesday Exclusive
We don’t like typical walnut cookies. The nuts get rubbery in cookies as soft and buttery as ours. So we leveled the walnut cookie up by topping it with our double-baked Candied Walnuts and hand placing each one all over the top of our Original Chocolate Chip Cookie. This Cookie is a huge time-consuming pain to make so we offer it for walkup service only on “Walnut Wednesday” or as a preorder item when you just can’t wait.
dishes.reasoning: Original Chocolate Chip cookie base contains butter and eggs; candied walnuts on top. | evidence: “Original Chocolate Chip Cookie, Candied Walnuts”

dishes.name: Carrot Cake
dishes.raw_description: Gideon’s finally has our version of a classic Carrot Cake! Enjoy three layers of soft Ginger Spiced Carrot Cake surrounded by our signature healthy portion of our Cheesecake Frosting and accented with super yummy Candied Pecans and, of course, Buttercream Carrots! Keep cool until ready to serve!
dishes.reasoning: Contains cream cheese frosting and buttercream with dairy. | evidence: “Cheesecake Frosting”

dishes.name: Carrot Cake Cookie
dishes.raw_description: This delightful baby is a delicious blend of flavorful and comforting spices, rich molasses, and finely incorporated carrots with a hint of tart. Completely covered with our crunchy house made candied pecans and a drizzle of our handsome carrot cream cheese glaze. So much flavor in an ultra soft and buttery Cookie complimented by a crunchy exterior!
dishes.reasoning: Contains cream cheese glaze (dairy) and buttery cookie dough with eggs. | evidence: “buttery Cookie and cream cheese glaze”

dishes.name: Chocolate Chip Marshmallow Cake

dishes.name: Chocolate Churro Cake
dishes.raw_description: For those of you who need a bit more than just chocolate in your chocolate cakes, enter the Chocolate Churro Cake! For this beauty we gently fold our Cinnamon Sugar Churro Seasoning into our fudgey Chocolate Buttercream! It offers a slightly crunchy texture in our very smooth buttercream, and we adore it!

dishes.name: Chocolate Churro Cookie
dishes.raw_description: The Chocolate Churro Cookie, aka the Calavera Cookie, is a deeply rich mega Chocolate Cookie is filled with cinnamon sugar and a tiny pinch of ancho and cayenne to give you that smokey warmth on the cooler days. Each Cookie has a layer of Dulce de Leche in the middle and is topped with a mix of chocolates, including our favorite Mexican Stone Ground Chocolate. Sugar, Spice, and everything Day of the Dead!
dishes.reasoning: Contains Dulce de Leche (dairy), chocolate (dairy), and likely butter and eggs. | evidence: “Dulce de Leche, chocolates”

dishes.name: Chocolate Coffee Toffee
dishes.raw_description: Behold, the Coffee Toffee Chocolate Cake! This towering behemoth features three layers of our super soft Chocolate Cake smothered in our signature thick double-frosted layers of both Coffee Buttercream AND Toffee Buttercream! What’s that crunch in the middle? It’s Chocolate Mini Chips and Toffee Pieces!

dishes.name: Chocolate Crumb Cake

dishes.name: Chocolate Everything Cake
dishes.raw_description: If you dream of chocolate throughout your day, then this cake is your soul mate. The softer ever chocolate cake with deep chocolate frosting layered with pieces of our Triple Chocolate Cookie then covered in our, you guessed it, rich chocolate ganache.

dishes.name: Coconut Caramel
dishes.raw_description: How about a Toasted Coconut Caramel Chocolate Chip!? We take our iconic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookie and fuse that vanilla bean dough with our Homemade Salted Caramel and Coconut Cream. The Cookie is topped with Shaved Toasted Coconut to give you the softest Cookie with some crunch!
dishes.reasoning: Cookie dough contains butter and eggs. | evidence: “Classic Chocolate Chip Cookie”

dishes.name: Coffee Cake
dishes.raw_description:
Only At
Disney Springs
The Gideon’s Coffee Cake Cookie is an extra Buttery Vanilla Bean Cookie filled with Cinnamon Strudel and topped with our Homemade Double Baked Butter Crumbs! Buttery. Crunchy. Extraordinary. Built to be paired with the Gideon’s Pumpkin Chai Nitro Cold Brew. This flavor is available every morning until sell out, only at Gideon’s at Disney Springs!
dishes.reasoning: Extra buttery cookie with butter crumbs; contains dairy. | evidence: “extra Buttery Vanilla Bean Cookie, Double Baked Butter Crumbs”

dishes.name: Coffee Toffee Chocolate Chip

Finished with a sprinkling of sea salt harvested from Mourning Joe's tears, this one will keep your spirit fueled!

dishes.name: Cookie Butter Butterscotch Cookie
dishes.raw_description: This handmade, almost half-pound prize focuses on two rich flavors, and the name says it all! The dough comprises a beautiful mixture of Gideon’s secrets and Biscoff Cookie Butter and is packed with premium Butterscotch Chips and crushed Biscoff Cookies! The combination is so very flavorful and a little sweeter than the average Gideon’s Cookie in the best possible way. ✨

dishes.name: Cookie Vom Krampus
dishes.raw_description: All the goodness of our rich and velvety Triple Chocolate Cookie (which is really five kinds of chocolate) with the added bonus of cool and refreshing chopped Andes Mint (which makes it SIX kinds of chocolate)! One of our favorites of the year because Chocolate and Mint is wonderful.

dishes.name: Cookies & Cream

dishes.name: Cookies & Cream Cake
dishes.raw_description: The ultimate cake for the Cookies & Cream fan. This almost 10-pound cake starts with our classic chocolate cake and is thickly frosted with our special C&C icing. In-between each layer you will find a bed of chopped cookies and the entire cake is covered in our signature chocolate ganache. Oh yea … more cookies go on top. Why not?

dishes.name: Dark Coffee Cake
dishes.raw_description:
Only At
Disney Springs
The Dark Coffee Cake Cookie is a Gideon’s Coffee Cake Cookie with a chocolate cookie base. Like his ambassador, Signora Pipistrello, the Dark Coffee Cake Cookie can only come out after dark and will be yours for the taking every evening strictly at Sunset until Sell Out! Ask your smartphone the time for Sunset, and Pipistrello’s Cookie will be waiting.
dishes.reasoning: Coffee Cake cookie base contains butter and butter crumbs; chocolate base does not change. | evidence: “Gideon’s Coffee Cake Cookie with a chocolate cookie base”

dishes.name: Eternal Flameless
dishes.raw_description: This Velvety Chocolate Cookie is laced with our special house-made Ancho (super mild) and Cinnamon Spice Mix, infused with a magical essence of cherry and topped with Chocolate Covered Cherries and White Chocolate Chips. Unlike the monthly Eternal Flame Cookie, this one has lost the heat of Cayenne and gained some sweet with White Chocolate. ⁣
dishes.reasoning: Contains chocolate covered cherries and white chocolate chips (dairy). | evidence: “Chocolate Covered Cherries, White Chocolate Chips”

dishes.name: Fluffernutter Cake

dishes.name: Golden Oreo Cake

dishes.name: Key Lime Chocolate Chip
dishes.raw_description: We love celebrating Florida with our favorite Florida fruit, the Key Lime! Our beloved Vanilla Bean Cookie Dough is infused with Florida Key Lime Juice and covered with Chocolate Chips and our special Key Lime Pie Crumbs. It’s the Cookie version of a chocolate dipped Key Lime Pie on a stick! This one is an absolute must try … but so is every Gideon’s Cookie!
dishes.reasoning: Contains chocolate chips (dairy) and likely butter and eggs in dough. | evidence: “Vanilla Bean Cookie Dough, Chocolate Chips”

dishes.name: Key Lime Pie Cake
dishes.raw_description: Behold one of the best cakes we’ve ever produced (in our biased opinion)! A super soft 3 Layer Vanilla Key Lime Cake with tangy Key Lime Frosting and Graham Cracker Crust pieces throughout. Just the right amount of zing! Truly, a fantastic experience that we want everyone to try!
dishes.reasoning: Contains frosting made with dairy. | evidence: “Key Lime Frosting”

dishes.name: Kris Kringle Cookie
dishes.raw_description: This White Chocolate Chip Cookie is filled with a complex mix of flavors like Coconut, Caramel, and Vanilla. We take it a step further by adding freshly ground coffee beans throughout the Cookie. The bitterness of the bean balances the sweetness! Our Cookie Elves then add the crunch of coarse sugar, our signature sea salt, and a pinch of Christmas cheer!!

dishes.name: Lemon Crumb Cake
dishes.raw_description: The Lemon Crumb Cake is one of the oldest cakes in the Gideon’s notebook! AKA Bonnie’s Cake is simple, soft, and flavorful. We hope you obsess over this Lemon Cake with Lemon Cream Cheese Frosting and Lemon Crumb accents. Keep this one cool!
dishes.reasoning: Contains cream cheese frosting with dairy. | evidence: “Lemon Cream Cheese Frosting”

dishes.name: Lemon Poppy Crumb Cookie
dishes.raw_description: It’s Bonnie’s Cookie! An updated version of Bonnie’s Original, this delightful Cookie is a muffin lover’s dream! We start with the softest Lemon Poppyseed Cookie filled with Poppyseeds and pockets of White Chocolate. Then we top things with a complete covering of our Lemon Butter Crumbs covered in a thin Sugar Glaze!
dishes.reasoning: Contains white chocolate (dairy) and butter crumbs. | evidence: “White Chocolate and Lemon Butter Crumbs”

dishes.name: Lemon PoppySeed
dishes.raw_description: To welcome Bonnie Brae, we have created the Lemon Poppyseed Cookie, a delicious new flavor! On top of the ingredients in the name, you’ll also find a lovely mix of White Chocolate Chips and some adorable little Lemon Mini Chips that we think you’ll enjoy.

dishes.name: Maple Walnut Chocolate Chip
dishes.raw_description: This flavorful Limited Edition Cookie gives you our Chocolate Chip Cookie mixed with the highest quality Maple Syrup. We throw in some housemade Candied Walnuts and sprinkle the top with a generous serving of our own Cinnamon Nutmeg Sugar! This Cookie is so very flavorful and addicting. We might even dream about it while it is away.

dishes.name: Mint Cookies & Cream

Please enjoy this three layer Chocolate Cake smothered Dark Orange Chocolate Buttercream that are coats with Chocolate Chips, Candied Pecans, and Candied Orange! Completely decadent!

dishes.name: Original Red Velvet Cake
dishes.raw_description: We won't lie, this one is our favorite. Most Red Velvet you find these days is a chocolate cake with red food coloring, but our masterpiece is a traditional vanilla buttermilk-based cake. Everything else is a lie! Insanely soft and delicate and heavily layered with our thick cream cheese frosting then covered in your choice of either our candied walnuts or white chocolate curls.

dishes.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Swirl

dishes.name: Peanut Butter Cold Brew Cookie
dishes.raw_description: We started by paying tribute to our popular Peanut Butter Nitro Cold Brew in Cookie form, but taking it up a notch! It's a PB Cookie laced with Freshly Ground Decaf Espresso and fully covered in chopped Reese's Peanut Butter Cups and Reese's Pieces!

dishes.name: Peanut Butter Cup Cake
dishes.raw_description: Chocolate and Peanut Butter at its finest. Our 3 layer chocolate cake with a perfect PB Buttercream. Honestly, our PB Buttercream might be one of the best things we do. Fluffy and not too sweet. It's glorious. In between every layer of cake is a layer of crushed Peanut Butter Cups. Then some ganache and more PB Cups and you've got a Gideon's Bakehouse Peanut Butter Cup Cake!

dishes.name: Pistachio Toffee Chocolate Chip
dishes.raw_description: A long-standing favorite in our community, this flavorful Cookie mixes our favorite chocolate chips with crunchy toffee pieces. Top that off with lightly salted pistachios and perfection is achieved. Sweet and Salty. Soft and Crunchy. Known for being our most sophisticated and addictive flavor, this is the Cookie that the Orlando Weekly suggests you try first.

dishes.name: Pumpkin Bread Chocolate Crumb
dishes.raw_description: We’re kinda thinking this might be our favorite Thanksgiving Cookie so it has returned for another year! This mammoth new dessert is filled with real Pumpkin, our House Pumpkin Spice Blend, a little bit of Chocolate on the inside, and a generous topping of Pumpkin Butter Crumbs! Soft and Crunchy and Flavorful and Delightful!

dishes.name: Rainbow Crunch Cake
dishes.raw_description: Our Rainbow Crunch Cake is now available as a whole cake preorder by popular demand! This fluffy 3-Layer Vanilla Confetti Cake is covered with our extraordinary multi-colored Marshmallow Buttercream and laced with our mega crunchy Rainbow Crumbs! Like all Gideon's cakes, this prideful blast of color is scratch-made by hand and made with all the love for all people always!

dishes.name: Raspberry Dark Coffee Cake
dishes.raw_description: For one week only, we released this very special flavor dubbed “Pipistrello’s Cookie” to raise money and awareness for our bat friends at the Lubee Bat Conservancy. Layered with housemade Raspberry Jam, this deeply rich Raspberry Triple Chocolate Chip Cookie is covered in Crunch Butter Crumbs and Rasperry Sugar. Will it ever return?  We can’t say for sure but it sure was delicious!
dishes.reasoning: Contains Crunch Butter Crumbs (dairy) and chocolate chips (dairy). | evidence: “Crunch Butter Crumbs”

dishes.name: S'mores Cake

dishes.name: Salted Caramel Cake
dishes.raw_description: Melt in your mouth chocolate cake covered in Salted Caramel Frosting with our homemade Salted Caramel poured in-between each and every layer. A favorite in the Gideon's kitchen!

dishes.name: Strawberry Crunch Cake
dishes.raw_description: The summer heat is incoming, and you deserve a refreshing and nostalgic new Cake! Introducing our Strawberry Crunch Cake, featuring our delicate Vanilla Cake layers lovingly Double Frosted with our classic Marshmallow Buttercream and Fresh Strawberry Buttercream covered in the most delicious housemade Strawberry Crumbs reminiscent of the classic Strawberry Shortcake ice cream bar!

dishes.name: The Eternal Flame
dishes.raw_description: Our Velvety Five Flavor Chocolate Cookie is laced with our special house-made Ancho, Cayenne, and Cinnamon Spice Mix, infused with a magical essence of cherry and topped with Chocolate Covered Cherries. It’s a deep chocolate flavor followed by the tingling warmth of a first kiss and the sweet presence of cherries. The one you’ve been waiting for your entire life is here, and it loves you without condition, eternally. * Available throughout February with a 72 hour preorder, or for walk ups Saturday and Sunday!

dishes.name: The Frankenstein
dishes.raw_description: One of our most popular and irresponsible Cookies of the Year! The Frankenstein is a Halloween month celebration, made from pieces parts of all the candies you want in your bag, and topped with M&M’s that we lovingly and meticulously place on top to be sure you get all the colors. Break it open and you’ll find crushed Oreo Double Stuff and Chocolate Pieces. Available only in October!

dishes.name: The Rocky Road
dishes.raw_description: This almost 1/2 pound gourmet Cookie is taken to the top with every single step. Step 1: Start with our amazingly velvety Triple Chocolate Cookie base (really five kinds of chocolate), smothered in Semi-Sweet and Dark Chocolates. Step 2: Mix in our housemade double-baked Whole Candied Almonds. Step 3: Throw in some gooey Marshmallow goodness. Step 4: Get it over the heat!!

dishes.name: The Sea Turtle Cookie
dishes.raw_description: Our tribute to the popular candy from 1918, the Sea Turtle Cookie nurtures you with premium Chocolate, Homemade Caramel that often busts out the sides, and whole Candied Pecans sprinkled with our signature Sea Salt. This masterpiece perfectly combines Sweet, Salty, Gooey, and Crunchy.
